scripts.build: yarn workspace @tenex/api build && yarn workspace @tenex/web build
scripts.test: yarn workspace @tenex/api test && yarn workspace @tenex/web test
scripts.start:e2e: yarn workspace @tenex/web build && concurrently -k -s first -n api,web "TENEX_USE_E2E_ENV=1 yarn workspace @tenex/api dev" "yarn workspace @tenex/web preview:e2e"
